L_Remarks: Stunning 15 Acre horse ranch on Lake Concow.  This unique property is cross fenced for horses and farm animals.  Two incredible metal horse barns provide ample fully covered stalls, hay/feed storage and an entire office for tact and all your animals’ necessary needs.  One Barn is fully enclosed protecting everything inside from weather and includes an office, workshop area, multiple stalls and turnout pins.  Located behind this barn, is an additional, third large metal storage barn for all your farm-related equipment.  The stunning horse training arena is meticulously leveled with care and built for horse training and riding!  The property is fully accessible with redwood tree lined trails, fenced garden areas, detached horse stalls in the pastures and boasts natural water shed with a lush, seasonal creek.  The trustee recently had the five acres resting on Lake Concow masticated and mulched providing stunning access and views of the nearly 400 feet of shoreline to Lake Concow.  This is a great spot to build a custom second home, and would provide stunning views of the lake, sunsets and nature.  \r\r\n\r\r\nThree parcels make up the 15 acres total and are being sold together, providing one of the most stunning privately owned ranches in the area.  The 2-bedroom, 2 bathroom manufactured home has had many updates over the years to include the primary bathroom and kitchen along with flooring throughout.  Recently the entire home was painted inside!  There is a attached carport providing access directly into the home.  The front of the home has a fully enclosed sun porch to enjoy the beautiful surroundings!  There are SEVERAL wells on the property, owned SOLAR and a Generac generator.  This is a rare opportunity to purchase nearly unscathed property in Concow.  The tree canopy is matured, groomed and ready for you to enjoy all the mountain ranch life, with lake front property!  Call your Realtor today to schedule a private tour.
